entries.en-US:
---
name: prune
description: Delete pending instincts older than 30 days that were never promoted
command: true
---
entries.zh-Hans:
---
name: prune
description: 删除超过30天且从未被提升的待处理本能
command: true
---

entries.en-US: Remove expired pending instincts that were auto-generated but never reviewed or promoted.
entries.zh-Hans: 移除已过期的待处理本能，这些本能是自动生成但从未被审核或提升的。

entries.en-US: Run the instinct CLI using the plugin root path:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用插件根路径运行本能 CLI：

entries.en-US: Or if `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT` is not set (manual installation):
entries.zh-Hans: 或者如果未设置 `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT`（手动安装）：

entries.en-US:
```
/prune                    # Delete instincts older than 30 days
/prune --max-age 60      # Custom age threshold (days)
/prune --dry-run         # Preview without deleting
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```
/prune                    # 删除超过 30 天的本能记录
/prune --max-age 60      # 自定义时间阈值（天）
/prune --dry-run         # 预览而不删除
```
